mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding two percentage points signals severe labor market deterioration that forces equity repricing downward over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed zero in more than 60% of triggered instances across a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent retail sales growth and federal funds rate cuts create a liquidity-driven demand surge that pushes S&P 500 prices higher within one week.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative 5-day returns in more than 50% of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant at p > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate supply chain normalization that supports corporate earnings expectations and drives positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 once industrial production exceeds 95% of pre-shock trend levels.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth rates positively correlate with aggregate corporate profitability, generating sustained positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of positive GDP growth quarters over a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll employment drop exceeding five million workers triggers immediate risk-off positioning that depresses S&P 500 forward returns for one month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in more than 65% of triggered observations during economic contractions.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized expansions in industrial production and housing starts signal broad-based economic reopening that lifts equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Combined signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of cases or interaction effect fails significance testing at p > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.25%, subsequent S&P 500 returns become negatively correlated with CPIAUCSL increases as inflation fears compress real yields.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive correlation with CPIAUCSL increases during ZLB periods or Rank IC exceeds 0.05.
